response: Braces are medical devices used to correct misaligned teeth and jaws. They work by applying gentle pressure to the teeth and jawbone, which helps guide the teeth into their proper positions over time. However, braces do not manipulate gravity at will because they are not designed to alter the forces of gravity. Gravity is a natural force that acts on all objects, and braces are simply tools that help control the movement of teeth under the influence of this force. The idea of manipulating gravity would require a technological or physical ability that is not possible with current medical devices. Therefore, people with braces cannot manipulate gravity at will. The last word of my response is **weakness**.
